name: Curve Stable Pool LP
description: Add or remove liquidity on a Curve StableSwap pool (e.g., 3pool, sDAI/USDC, FRAX/USDC). Earns swap fees + CRV emissions. The deepest stablecoin liquidity on Ethereum.
use_case: Agent has 30k USDC and 30k DAI. Deposits both into the 3pool LP (FRAX/USDC/USDT). Earns ~3-5% APR from swap fees + ~2-4% extra from CRV emissions if voted on by veCRV.

verification.criteria: Post-tx the agent holds non-zero balance of the pool's LP token AND total tokens deposited matches inputs within 0.1%.
